name: Tianci International, Inc.
business: The company provides global logistics services through its subsidiary Roshing, primarily ocean freight forwarding including container shipping and bulk goods shipping. Additionally, it generates a small portion of revenue from the sale of electronic parts, software technical services, and business consulting services. Customers are primarily cargo owners, cargo agents, international trade companies, and large commodity buyers in the Asia-Pacific region.

exposures.sentence: The Company, through its subsidiary, Roshing, provides global logistics services, encompassing booking, the transportation arrangement, and related logistics solutions.
During 2025, we prepared the Company to expand into global trade of bulk chrome and manganese ore by sourcing high-grade minerals directly from resource-rich regions and building up inventory.

catalysts.event: Completion of initial public offering on Nasdaq
catalysts.sentence: On April 11, 2025, we completed a $7 million initial public offering and became a listed company on Nasdaq.
